evals.name: JSON MCQ to HTML quiz generation
evals.expected_output: An HTML file named climate-change-basics.html in the current directory containing an interactive quiz with 2 MCQ questions, 3-4 cards each, with splash screen, progress bar, lives system, XP tracking, and result screen with confetti.

evals.name: Markdown to HTML multi-type quiz generation
evals.prompt:
I have this markdown quiz about sexual health. Generate an interactive HTML quiz from it and save it in the current folder.

```markdown
# Sexual Health Quiz

## What is the most effective form of contraception?
- **Condom**: 98% effective when used correctly [correct]
- **Withdrawal method**: 78% effective
- **Calendar method**: 76% effective

## True or False: Condoms protect against STIs
- Correct: true
- Explanation: Condoms provide protection against most STIs when used correctly

## Fill in the blank: The {0} is the most effective form of contraception
- [Condom] [IUD] [Implant] [Sterilization]
- Answer: Condom
- Accept: Condom, Male Condom
```
evals.expected_output: An HTML file named sexual-health-quiz.html in the current directory containing an interactive quiz with 3 questions (MCQ, True/False, Fill-in-the-Blank), with splash screen, progress bar, lives system, XP tracking, and result screen. No images or audio (none in source).

evals.name: Excel CSV to HTML quiz with mixed types
evals.prompt:
I have a CSV file with quiz data about world capitals. Generate an interactive HTML quiz and name it after the file.

File: C:\Users\getur\Downloads\world-capitals.csv

--- contents of world-capitals.csv:
question,card_title,card_explanation,is_correct
"What is the capital of France?","Paris","Paris is the capital and largest city of France",yes
"What is the capital of France?","London","London is the capital of the UK, not France",no
"What is the capital of France?","Berlin","Berlin is the capital of Germany",no
"What is the largest ocean?","Pacific Ocean","The Pacific is the largest ocean on Earth",yes
"What is the largest ocean?","Atlantic Ocean","The Atlantic is the second largest ocean",no
"What is the largest ocean?","Indian Ocean","The Indian Ocean is the third largest ocean",no
evals.expected_output: An HTML file named world-capitals.html in the current directory with 2 questions (inferred as MCQ type), 3 cards each, correct answers marked. Includes splash screen, progress bar, lives system, XP tracking, and result screen.

evals.name: JSON with multiple question types
evals.expected_output: An HTML file named geography-quiz.html in the current directory with 3 questions of types matching, sequencing, and numeric. All interactive features working: matching click-to-pair, drag-and-drop sequencing, and numeric input with tolerance check.
